name: Sun Dragon
description: Sun Dragon is a scrapped character and the original design for the Skylander Camo. He briefly appeared in the early promotional trailer 'Skylanders: The Beginning' as a member of the Life element.
biography: Sun Dragon was one of the earliest Skylanders designed during the development of 'Spyro's Kingdom'. He was originally intended to be a more menacing Life-elemental dragon. However, during the transition into 'Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure', his design was overhauled and softened, eventually becoming the character Camo. Despite being replaced, he remains a notable part of Skylanders history due to his appearance in early trailers.
personality: Sun Dragon was designed with a more intimidating and menacing appearance compared to the final version of Camo. While he was never given a spoken personality in the final games, his early concept art suggests a fiercer, more primal nature.

story.content: Sun Dragon was present during the initial pitch of the game. He was intended to represent the Life element as a playable dragon. Late in the development cycle, the team decided to redesign him, leading to the creation of Camo. The two share an identical moveset, indicating that Camo is a direct evolution of the Sun Dragon concept.

trivia: Sun Dragon, Fire Kraken, and Flare Wolf are the only Skylanders who use fireworks to fight.
The dragon heads on the door archways around the Creepy Citadel are modelled after Sun Dragon.
He can be seen in the background of 'The Beginning' trailer near Slam Bam and Wrecking Ball.
Sun Dragon bears a resemblance to Shenron from the Dragon Ball series.
He appears in a flashback in Skylanders: SuperChargers using footage from the original teaser.
gameplay: Sun Dragon's gameplay was centered around life-based magic and explosive pyrotechnics. Like Camo, he would have summoned firecracker vines to trap enemies and fired sun bursts to deal ranged damage.

basic.name: Sun Burst
basic.content: Fires a concentrated burst of sun energy at enemies.

basic.name: Firecracker Vines
basic.content: Summons vines that explode upon contact with enemies.
